title: Smart AI routing explained
summary: IBM Technology presents an opinion that AI labs are moving away from pursuing the largest models toward smart routing approaches. The shift is motivated by cost efficiency and trust considerations rather than raw model scale.
writeup: IBM Technology frames smart AI routing as a shift in AI labs from scaling model size toward intelligent routing of requests to the appropriate model. The video argues that this approach prioritizes cost efficiency and trust in model selection, and it touches on local inference and model evaluation as part of the routing decision. The takeaway: matching each request to a suitable model, rather than defaulting to the largest one, is positioned as the emerging direction for managing cost and reliability.
